profile.name: Suheb Ghare
profile.title: Senior SRE & DevOps Engineer
profile.summary: Senior Site Reliability Engineer and DevOps Engineer with 7+ years of hands-on experience building and operating production-grade infrastructure on AWS. Specializing in Kubernetes (EKS), GitOps, CI/CD automation, observability, FinOps, security hardening, disaster recovery, and AI-powered DevOps workflows. Based in Dubai, UAE.

education.degree: Bachelor of Engineering in Computer Science
education.description: Focused on computer science fundamentals, software engineering, and system design. Built strong foundation in programming and technology.

experience.title: SRE / DevOps Engineer
experience.description: Leading Site Reliability Engineering and DevOps operations for a high-traffic e-commerce platform serving millions of users across the Middle East.
responsibilities: Ensure high availability and reliability of production systems
Implement and maintain CI/CD pipelines for continuous delivery
Monitor system performance and optimize infrastructure
Manage cloud infrastructure and containerized applications on AWS EKS
Automate operational tasks and improve deployment processes
Collaborate with development teams to enhance system reliability
Drive FinOps initiatives to reduce AWS cloud spend
Implement observability using Grafana Cloud, Prometheus, Loki, and OpenTelemetry
Build AI-powered DevOps automation and agentic workflows

experience.title: DevOps Engineer
experience.description: Led DevOps initiatives and cloud infrastructure management for 10+ retail and e-commerce brands including Nesto Online, Geepas, Wigme, and INAAM loyalty platform.
responsibilities: Automated deployment procedures for enterprise applications across Production, Staging, and Development environments
Reduced complexity and closed the gap between application changes and reliability maintenance
Deployed and configured microservice applications using Docker and Kubernetes
Designed and implemented CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins and GitHub Actions
Managed AWS cloud infrastructure and services
Implemented monitoring and alerting from scratch for 10+ brands
Led containerization and migration of legacy applications to EKS

experience.title: Cloud Engineer
experience.description: Led full cloud migration and infrastructure automation for a large food production enterprise.
responsibilities: Migrated full organizational workload from on-premises to AWS
Architected highly available, scalable, resilient, secure and fault-tolerant solutions on AWS
Designed multi-tier VPC architecture with EC2 Auto Scaling, RDS Multi-AZ, S3, and CloudFront
Configured fully automated CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins, AWS CodePipeline, and Shell Scripts
Provisioned all infrastructure using Terraform and CloudFormation
Implemented monitoring with CloudWatch, Nagios, and NewRelic
Designed and validated disaster recovery and backup strategies

experience.title: Software Engineer
experience.description: Developed and implemented .NET applications and Microsoft platform solutions.
responsibilities: Assisted in analysis, architecture, design, development and implementation of .NET applications
Configured and implemented applications based on Microsoft products (.NET, SQL Server)
Contributed actively to building and growing the .NET team
Worked on application support and maintenance

projects.title: Production Reliability & Downtime Elimination
projects.impact: Production incidents down 70% · MTTR cut in half
projects.description: Took ownership of production reliability for a high-traffic e-commerce platform where every minute of downtime directly impacts revenue. Introduced synthetic monitoring, proactive alerting on leading indicators, and SLO-based on-call policies — shifting the team from reactive firefighting to proactive incident prevention.

projects.title: Full-Stack Observability Platform
projects.description: Designed and deployed end-to-end observability across 20+ microservices using Grafana Cloud, Prometheus, Loki, and OpenTelemetry. Built service-level dashboards, distributed trace correlation, and structured log pipelines.

projects.title: AWS FinOps — Significant Cost Reduction
projects.description: Ran a systematic FinOps audit across the entire AWS account — rightsized EC2 and RDS instances, consolidated NAT Gateways, removed idle load balancers, purchased Compute Savings Plans, and implemented EKS namespace cost allocation.

projects.title: AI-Powered Observability & Debugging Acceleration
projects.impact: Debug time cut from hours to minutes
projects.description: Integrated AI into the observability workflow — used LLMs to auto-generate Grafana dashboards, summarize Loki log anomalies during incidents, and suggest probable root causes from alert context.

projects.title: AI Agents for Developer & QA Self-Service
projects.description: Built agentic AI workflows that handle common developer and QA requests autonomously — environment provisioning, log retrieval, deployment status checks, and test environment resets via Slack.

projects.title: GitOps CI/CD Platform with AI-Gated Deployments
projects.description: Rebuilt the CI/CD platform using GitHub Actions with self-hosted EKS runners, Docker builds, ECR scanning via Trivy, ArgoCD GitOps, and AI-based pre-deployment validation that blocks unsafe releases.

projects.title: Production EKS Platform & Kubernetes Engineering
projects.description: Owned the full lifecycle of a production EKS cluster running 20+ microservices. Implemented Istio service mesh, KEDA event-driven autoscaling, HPA, and ALB ingress with WAF integration.

projects.title: Disaster Recovery & Backup Strategy
projects.impact: RTO < 30 min · RPO < 1 hour · DR tested quarterly
projects.description: Designed full DR strategy — automated RDS snapshots with cross-region replication, EKS backups via Velero, S3 versioning, and quarterly DR drills to validate recovery objectives.

projects.title: Infrastructure as Code & Environment Standardization
projects.impact: New env provisioned in minutes · Drift eliminated
projects.description: Migrated all AWS infrastructure to Terraform with modular components. Enforced IaC-only changes via CI gates using tfsec and Checkov. Eliminated environment drift.

projects.title: Security Hardening — WAF, Secrets & Compliance
projects.impact: 95%+ malicious traffic blocked · Zero hardcoded secrets
projects.description: Multi-layer security overhaul: AWS WAF at CloudFront edge, Secrets Manager replacing hardcoded credentials with IRSA rotation, and automated compliance scanning in CI. Led VAPT remediation.

projects.title: SRE Automation & Internal Workflow Tooling
projects.description: Automated highest-friction SRE workflows — certificate checks, stale resource cleanup, deployment health verification, and on-call handoff reports. Built Slack bots for developer self-service.

projects.title: Monitoring & Alerting from Zero to Production
projects.description: Built complete observability stack from scratch covering 10+ retail brands. Defined escalation policies and on-call runbooks — the team's first structured incident response process.

projects.title: CI/CD Pipeline Modernization for Multi-Brand Platform
projects.description: Replaced manual deployments with fully automated Jenkins pipelines for Java and Node.js apps. Integrated Ansible config management, rollback triggers, and Slack notifications.

projects.title: Kubernetes (EKS) Adoption & Container Migration
projects.description: Led containerization and migration of legacy monolithic applications to Docker and Kubernetes on AWS EKS. Designed Helm chart templates and configured ALB ingress with HPA autoscaling.

projects.title: Disaster Recovery & Backup Implementation
projects.impact: First DR plan in org history · Recovery validated
projects.description: Designed the organization's first formal DR strategy — automated RDS and EC2 snapshots, S3 cross-region replication, and documented recovery runbooks. Conducted first-ever DR drill.

projects.title: Infrastructure Automation with Terraform & Ansible
projects.description: Replaced ad-hoc manual provisioning with Terraform modules covering VPC, EC2, RDS, S3, and IAM. Used Ansible for server config management across all brand environments.

projects.title: Full AWS Cloud Migration from On-Premises
projects.description: Led end-to-end migration of all on-premises workloads to AWS. Architected HA multi-tier infrastructure with VPC, EC2 Auto Scaling, RDS Multi-AZ, S3, and CloudFront. Provisioned via Terraform and CloudFormation.

projects.title: CI/CD Pipelines & Automated Deployments
projects.impact: Manual deployments replaced · Release risk reduced
projects.description: Built automated CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins and AWS CodePipeline. Integrated health checks post-deployment and replaced risky manual release processes with repeatable, auditable pipelines.

projects.title: Infrastructure Monitoring & Incident Response Setup
projects.description: Built the organization's first monitoring stack using CloudWatch, Nagios, and NewRelic. Defined alerting thresholds, SNS escalation policies, and on-call runbooks. Transformed incident response from reactive to proactive.

projects.title: Disaster Recovery Design & Backup Automation
projects.description: Designed comprehensive DR and backup strategy — automated RDS snapshots, EC2 AMI backups, S3 versioning, and cross-region replication. Documented and validated full recovery runbooks.

projects.title: Infrastructure as Code & Operational Efficiency
projects.description: Standardized all infrastructure provisioning using Terraform and Ansible — from VPC and compute to application config and OS hardening. Eliminated inconsistency of manually configured servers.

projects.title: Agentic AI for Incident Triage & Auto-Runbooks
projects.description: Built an agentic AI system that ingests Grafana alerts, pulls correlated log context from Loki, and uses an LLM to generate incident summaries, probable root causes, and step-by-step remediation actions delivered via Slack.

projects.title: AI-Assisted DevOps Tooling & Vibe Coding
projects.description: Use Cursor, Claude, and GitHub Copilot to build production-grade DevOps utilities — a Kubernetes cost analyzer, Terraform drift detector, and an internal ops dashboard — combining SRE domain knowledge with AI-assisted coding.

addresses.present: 1206, Andalusia Tower, Al Nahda 1, Dubai, UAE
addresses.permanent: 102, Amin Seth Plaza, Bhendi Naka, Chiplun, Maharashtra, India
